'''鈭歠-v-zh-r''' ('''kafavzheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyopreserve|lyopreserve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyopreserve|lyopreserve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-v-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kafavzheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifavzheroko|thifavzheroko]] || [[word:jifavzheroko|jifavzheroko]] || [[word:shifavzheroko|shifavzheroko]] || [[word:kifavzheroko|kifavzheroko]]

|-
